phrases.en: Paul measured out one cup of rice.
And poured it into the pot of a rice cooker.
phrases.zh: 并把它倒进电饭煲的内锅里。

phrases.en: To rinse the rice, he put some water in the pot.
phrases.zh: 为了淘米，他往锅里加了一些水。

phrases.en: He poured off the water to get rid of the dirt and husks.
phrases.zh: 他把水倒掉，去除杂质和米糠。

phrases.en: Then, he measured out two cups of clean water and poured it into the pot.
phrases.zh: 然后，他量出两杯清水倒进锅里。

phrases.en: He put the pot into the rice cooker and put a lid on the cooker.
phrases.zh: 他把内锅放进电饭煲，并盖上了盖子。

phrases.en: He turned it on by pressing the switch.
The rice boiled in the cooker.
phrases.zh: 米饭在电饭煲里煮熟了。

phrases.en: When the rice was done, the cooker turned off automatically.
phrases.zh: 米饭煮好后，电饭煲自动关闭了。

phrases.en: Paul spooned some of the cooked rice onto his plate.
phrases.zh: 保罗用勺子舀了一些煮好的米饭到盘子里。
